passiveEffect: Hit hard! Choose a Physical Move, increase its Power by 3. All other Moves get their Power reduced by 3.

passiveEffect: An amulet of protection against evil. Attributes and traits of the user can't be lowered by other Pokémon.

passiveEffect: The red string of fate may never break. If this Pokémon falls in love the foe will fall in love with them in return.

description: A tempting big red button. Do not push. After receiving damage, activate the Switcher effect for the user. Effect activates only once per Round.
passiveEffect: A tempting big red button. Do not push. After receiving damage, activate the Switcher effect for the user. Effect activates only once per Round.

name: Eviolite
description: A mineral that reacts to raw potential. Increase by 1 the Defense and Sp. Defense of a 1st or 2nd stage Pokémon.
passiveEffect: A mineral that reacts to raw potential. Increase by 1 the Defense and Sp. Defense of a 1st or 2nd stage Pokémon.

name: Expert Belt

passiveEffect: The symbol of a true martial artist. Super-Effective Moves used by this Pokémon deal 1 extra damage.

passiveEffect: A magical orb that casts a small fire. Warning: keep away from children & pets. User gets a 1st degree burn when they come out.

passiveEffect: Remain concious until the end. The first time the user would faint due to damage from a move, remain at 1 HP instead.

passiveEffect: These metal-plated boots will protect your feet even from a bear trap. The user is immune to Entry Hazards.

passiveEffect: A heavy ball chain that drags you down. Reduce the users Dexterity by 1, and remove immunity to Ground-Type

passiveEffect: A crown-shaped rock. May trigger Evolution on certain Pokémon. Add 1 Chance dice to Flinch on all Special Moves.

passiveEffect: A common leek. It is loved by Farfetch'd and gives the High Critical Effect to all their Physical and Special Moves.

name: Leftovers

passiveEffect: Dont waste food. Heal 1 Damage at the end of the Round. Consumed after healing 3 Damage.

passiveEffect: A cursed item that promises power. Add the Recoil effect and 2 Extra dice to the damage pool of Physical and Special Moves.

passiveEffect: This Herb infuses a red energy. Remove the need to charge from a Charge Move. Single use
